headlines.title: Venezuelans dig for earthquake survivors as 72-hour rescue window nears end
headlines.snippet: At least 920 people are confirmed dead and more than 51,000 missing after two quakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Thai police arrest Australian over killing of teenager found in suitcase
headlines.snippet: Thai police have arrested an Australian man at Bangkok's main airport as he was allegedly attempting to fly home. He is suspected of killing a teenager whose body was found stuffed inside a suitcase.

headlines.title: Germany braces for record-breaking temperatures as heatwave moves east
headlines.snippet: Germany is preparing for extremely high temperatures as a heatwave moves eastward. Several European countries, including the UK and Switzerland, have already experienced record June temperatures, with some fatalities reported in France.

headlines.title: Somali intelligence helps US arrest alleged leader of Minnesota fraud
headlines.snippet: Somali intelligence played a role in the US arrest of an alleged leader of a fraud operation based in Minnesota. US prosecutors sought the suspect in Somalia to bring him to justice for crimes committed in the United States.

headlines.title: Iran war day 120: Tehran condemns US strikes, says it violates MoU
headlines.snippet: Iran's foreign ministry condemned US strikes, stating they violate a Memorandum of Understanding. The US reported targeting Iranian missile and drone storage sites, while Iran claimed to have hit US military locations.

headlines.title: Child succumbs to injuries from Israeli attack on Gaza as death toll rises to 73,043
headlines.snippet: Child succumbs to injuries from Israeli attack on Gaza as death toll rises to 73,043 A 10-year old Palestinian child has died from wounds sustained in an Israeli strike on southern Gaza, according to medical sources.

headlines.title: Iran says any violation of shipping instructions through strait will be met decisively
headlines.snippet: Iran says any violation of shipping instructions through strait will be met decisively The head of national security in Iran’s parliament said on Saturday that any violation of Iran’s shipping instructions through the Strait of Hormuz would be met decisively.

headlines.title: Drone targets Iranian Kurdish opposition camp in Iraq: Reuters
headlines.snippet: Drone targets Iranian Kurdish opposition camp in Iraq: Reuters An explosive drone targeted a camp belonging to an Iranian Kurdish opposition group north of Iraq’s Erbil, Reuters reported on Saturday, citing security sources.

headlines.title: Bahrain condemns Iranian drone attacks on its territory
headlines.snippet: Bahrain condemns Iranian drone attacks on its territory Bahrain has condemned what it said were Iranian drone attacks on its territory on Saturday, accusing Tehran of undermining peace efforts in the region.

headlines.title: France’s terrorism apology law faces test in pro-Palestine case

headlines.title: Ms Rachel says world has failed Palestinian children at briefing
